values: monochrome pencil illustration, violent chiaroscuro, 19th century engraving style
ink drawing with obsessive crosshatching, antique illustration texture, hard shadow blocks
woodcut print style, rough carved linework, brutal black and white contrast
diluted ink wash and dry brush streaks, ghostly paper grain, harsh tonal jumps
ukiyo-e inspired line rhythm, dramatic wave forms, severe monochrome gradation
museum specimen plate style, scientific diagram aesthetics, archival ink, ominous negative space

monster_bases.description: 怪物の核となるモチーフ
values: cephalopod-inspired abyssal deity whose body plan is no longer zoological
arachnid and abyssal vertebrate derived titan with impossible limb logic
plant-insect inspired oracle-beast with ritualized root tendrils
lepidopteran-inspired shrine-monster made of cartilage, membrane, and void
sentient coral-cathedral organism fused with predatory anatomy
colossal brain-eye biomass idol with non-biological musculature

motif_transformation_rules.description: 動物モチーフの怪物化ルール
values: keep only motif traces, avoid literal real-animal appearance
prioritize alien anatomy over recognizable species identity
deconstruct familiar animal traits into ritual-biomechanical forms
blend motif cues into nightmare geometry so no direct species match remains
treat original fauna as symbolic source, not final morphology
suppress cute or naturalistic zoology; emphasize predatory mythic mutation
asymmetric eye clusters and scar-like luminescent nodules
skeletal limbs fused with torn tendrils and tendon ropes
moss-covered carapace erupting with tumor-like ridges
coral branches replacing vertebrae, ribs, and jaw hinges
human cranial fragments embedded in chitinous armor
ragged membranes stretched over exposed cartilaginous frames

anatomical_anomalies.description: 解剖学的に不可能な特徴
values: its boundaries dissolve into surrounding darkness
its body loops in non-euclidean folds
its silhouette never settles into a fixed anatomy
its internal organs are visible yet spatially impossible
its limbs emerge and retract from impossible angles
its surface shifts between rock, flesh, and mist
a cosmic abyss that feels both deep ocean and outer space
a ruined cathedral ceiling opening into a starless void
a collapsing library of forbidden astronomy manuscripts
hydrothermal vents in the black deep sea trench
an abandoned megacity swallowed by nebula-like fog
a desert horizon splitting open into an eldritch breach
a dream-geometry corridor with impossible perspective
a ritual chamber carved beneath cyclopean ruins

atmosphere_particles.description: 粒子・霧・渦などの空気感
values: swirling ash-like particles and cold mist strands
nebular dust spirals and wet abyssal haze
smoke vortices that mimic tidal currents
faint drifting spores with static-like glitter
submerged sediment clouds and distant phosphorescence
fog layers that bend around unseen gravity
an unclear light source glows from nowhere, carving deep black cavities
backlit haze reveals only fractured contours and cutout silhouettes
dim rim light catches wet tendrils while faces sink into darkness
flickering ritual light and cosmic underglow with violent tonal separation
extreme monochrome chiaroscuro, engraved shadows, near-black occlusion
needle-thin highlights piercing vast darkness like surgical cuts

monochrome_value_design.description: 白黒・明暗の設計バリエーション
values: pure black and chalk white only, almost no midtone
high-key monochrome with blinding whites and crisp black linework
low-key monochrome dominated by heavy blacks and faint silver edges
silver-gray midtones crushed by sudden black void pockets
bleached paper whites against ink-saturated silhouettes
charcoal grayscale with deep shadow masses and selective bright accents
low human viewpoint emphasizing impossible scale difference
top-down surveillance angle, as if the viewer is being watched
cross-sectional composition showing internal impossible geometry
spiral composition pulling the gaze into the center abyss
distant silhouette composition with tiny foreground witnesses
multi-entity swarm composition around one central deity-form
depicted as a forbidden page from an old sailor's logbook
presented as a scientist's field observation report
captured at the climax of an unfinished summoning ritual
rendered as an archaeological mural in ruined stone
shown as evidence recovered from a lost expedition
framed like a museum archive annotation with specimen numbering
weathered occult sigils carved into surrounding surfaces
fragmented astronomical diagrams and impossible star charts
latin annotation fragments and specimen labels
eroded ritual circles stained with mineral residue
half-erased expedition notes in the margins
repeating eye motifs hidden in architecture
strict monochrome black and silver graphite tones
black, white, and sparse steel-gray only
cold grayscale with near-white highlights and abyssal blacks
archival monochrome sepia reduced almost to grayscale
ink-black base with pale ash highlights only
bone-white paper tone against tar-black forms
overwhelming cosmic dread and sacred beauty
beautiful horror with ancient unknowable presence
quiet terror and metaphysical melancholy
oppressive awe mixed with reverent fascination
dreamlike unease and existential vertigo
cold documentary detachment over impossible terror
ultra-detailed linework with obsessive micro-texture
balanced detail with clear focal hierarchy
dense edge detail fading into atmospheric abstraction
high-frequency hatching and rough tactile grain
careful engraving detail with controlled negative space
layered material textures with anatomical intricacy

cosmic_monochrome_engraving.text: {art_mediums}. A {monster_bases} shaped by {motif_transformation_rules}, with {hybrid_mutations}; {anatomical_anomalies}. Set in {spatial_domains}, filled with {atmosphere_particles}. {lighting_moods}. {monochrome_value_design}. {composition_views}. {narrative_frames}. {symbolic_marks}. {color_schemes}. {detail_density}. Mood: {emotional_tones}.

Include {symbolic_marks}. Keep {color_schemes} and {detail_density}. Evoke {emotional_tones}.
